_calibration_notes: Zone polygons calibrated from actual frame inspection of CAM1-CAM5 footage dated 10/04/2026. All coords are fractional [0.0-1.0] of frame dimensions (1920x1080). Foot position (bottom-centre of bbox) is used for zone classification.

CAM_ENTRY_01.description: Entry/exit glass door camera. Camera is inside the store looking toward the glass sliding door. Wooden floor is store interior (upper portion of frame), dark polished marble is the entrance vestibule/outside (lower portion). The entry threshold is a horizontal boundary at approximately y=0.52.
CAM_ENTRY_01._inbound_note: 'above' means y < 0.52 = inside store (top of frame). Person crossing threshold upward (y decreasing) = ENTRY.

zones._note: The transition zone at the glass door — bottom portion of frame is outside, top is store interior
Inside the store near entry — display stand area visible in frame

CAM_FLOOR_01.description: Main brand shelf wall camera. Elevated angle looking at the long shelf wall. Visible brands: The Face Shop (TFS) top-left, Good Vibes top-centre-left, Derma/DermDoc top-centre, Maybel/Maybelline top-right. People browsing appear in the lower half of frame (y=0.50-1.0). High stool/consultation area visible far right.

zones._note: The Face Shop + Good Vibes section — left half of shelf wall. Foot positions x=0.05-0.42, y=0.55-1.0
DermDoc + Minimalist section — centre of shelf wall. Foot positions x=0.40-0.62
Maybelline + right side brand bay. Foot positions x=0.60-0.83
High stool / beauty consultation area far right — visible stool in frame

CAM_FLOOR_02.description: Colour cosmetics and makeup section. Visible brands: Lakme, FacesCanada, Maybelline, Swiss Beauty display. Group of customers visible in centre of frame. Camera is at product height level looking along the shelf.

zones._note: Lakme + FacesCanada section — left side of CAM2 frame. Foot positions x=0.0-0.45
Maybelline + Swiss Beauty section — right half of CAM2. Foot positions x=0.44-0.85
Central open display counter visible in middle of frame

CAM_BILLING_01.description: Billing counter area. Billing counter with POS laptop occupies left-centre of frame. Customer queue area is in front of the counter (centre frame). Staff position is behind the counter (left area). Accessories display on far right.

zones._note: Customer queue area in front of billing counter. Centre of frame, lower half. Foot positions x=0.15-0.60, y=0.45-1.0
Staff-side of billing counter — behind the POS terminal. is_staff_zone=true prevents staff from triggering BILLING_QUEUE_JOIN
Accessories display on far right of billing camera — 'ACCESSORIES' text visible

CAM_STOCKROOM_01.description: Back room / stockroom. Purplle branded cardboard boxes, swivel chair, water cooler, product shelves. No customers enter this area. EXCLUDED from customer analytics pipeline.
